resumeText:
Alex Chen | Staff Software Engineer | alex.chen@email.com | linkedin.com/in/alexchen | github.com/alexchen

SUMMARY
Staff Engineer with 12 years of experience designing and scaling distributed systems at high-growth companies. Led architecture decisions serving 50M+ users. Expert in Go, Kotlin, and cloud-native infrastructure.

EXPERIENCE
Staff Software Engineer — Stripe (2019–Present)
- Redesigned payment processing pipeline, reducing transaction latency by 42% and supporting 3x traffic growth
- Led a team of 8 engineers to deliver a new fraud detection system, cutting chargebacks by $12M annually
- Established engineering-wide standards for observability, adopted by 200+ engineers across 30 teams
- Mentored 6 senior engineers; 3 were promoted to staff level under direct guidance

Senior Software Engineer — Airbnb (2016–2019)
- Built real-time pricing engine processing 800K events/sec using Kafka and Flink
- Reduced infrastructure costs by 28% ($4.2M/yr) via compute optimization initiative

Software Engineer — Twitter (2012–2016)
- Contributed to timeline service handling 300K req/sec; improved cache hit rate from 72% to 94%

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — Stanford University (2012)

SKILLS
Languages: Go, Kotlin, Java, Python | Distributed Systems: Kafka, Flink, gRPC, Envoy | Cloud: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes | Observability: Datadog, OpenTelemetry

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Solutions Architect – Professional | Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer

Priya Sharma | Senior Data Scientist | priya.sharma@email.com | linkedin.com/in/priyasharma

SUMMARY
Senior Data Scientist with 7 years of experience building ML models that drive measurable business outcomes. Published 3 peer-reviewed papers. Expert in NLP, forecasting, and MLOps pipelines.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Scientist — Netflix (2021–Present)
- Developed recommendation model improvements that increased average watch time by 8.3 minutes/day per user, worth ~$90M incremental revenue
- Built an A/B testing framework adopted by 12 product teams, reducing experiment cycle time by 35%
- Led migration of 40 models to MLflow + SageMaker, cutting deployment time from 3 weeks to 2 days

Data Scientist — Uber (2018–2021)
- Built surge pricing forecast model reducing driver shortfall events by 22%
- Developed NLP classifier for driver feedback with 91% accuracy, processing 500K monthly reviews

Junior Data Scientist — Capital One (2017–2018)
- Supported credit risk modeling team; improved delinquency prediction AUC from 0.78 to 0.84

EDUCATION
M.S. Statistics — Carnegie Mellon University (2017)
B.S. Mathematics — University of Michigan (2015)

SKILLS
Python, R, SQL, Spark | TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn | MLflow, SageMaker, Airflow | NLP, Time Series, Bayesian Methods

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty | Google Professional ML Engineer

Marcus Williams | Senior DevOps Engineer | marcus.w@email.com | linkedin.com/in/marcuswilliams

SUMMARY
Senior DevOps Engineer with 6 years of experience building cloud infrastructure and CI/CD platforms at scale. Reduced deployment failures by 60% across multiple organizations. HashiCorp Certified Terraform Associate and CKA certified.

EXPERIENCE
Senior DevOps Engineer — Shopify (2021–Present)
- Architected multi-region Kubernetes platform hosting 1,200+ microservices with 99.99% uptime SLA
- Implemented GitOps workflow (ArgoCD + Flux) reducing deployment lead time from 4 hours to 18 minutes
- Built self-service infrastructure portal eliminating 80% of manual provisioning tickets (saving 120 eng-hrs/month)
- Led incident response improvements, cutting mean time to recovery (MTTR) from 47 min to 9 min

DevOps Engineer — Twilio (2019–2021)
- Migrated 60 legacy services from bare-metal to EKS, reducing infrastructure costs by $1.8M/yr
- Designed secrets management solution using Vault + AWS IAM, achieving SOC 2 Type II compliance

Junior DevOps Engineer — Rackspace (2018–2019)
- Maintained Terraform modules used by 20+ teams; improved module test coverage from 0% to 85%

EDUCATION
B.S. Information Systems — Georgia Tech (2018)

SKILLS
Kubernetes, Helm, ArgoCD | Terraform, Ansible, Pulumi | AWS, GCP, Azure | Python, Bash, Go | Prometheus, Grafana, PagerDuty

CERTIFICATIONS
Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) | HashiCorp Terraform Associate | AWS DevOps Engineer – Professional

Sarah Kim | Senior Mobile Engineer | sarah.kim@email.com | github.com/sarahkim | linkedin.com/in/sarahkim-mobile

SUMMARY
Senior Mobile Engineer with 8 years building high-performance iOS and Android apps. Expert in Swift, Kotlin, and React Native. Led 4 app launches with 4.8+ App Store ratings and 10M+ combined downloads.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Mobile Engineer — Duolingo (2020–Present)
- Rewrote onboarding flow in Swift/Compose reducing drop-off by 18%, adding 2.1M new activated users/yr
- Built offline-first sync architecture handling 400K daily active learners without connectivity loss
- Reduced app binary size by 34% through asset optimization and dead code elimination
- Improved iOS app launch time from 3.8s to 1.1s via background prefetch and lazy initialization

Senior iOS Engineer — Headspace (2018–2020)
- Led audio streaming overhaul; cut buffering incidents by 72% for 30M+ subscribers
- Shipped sleep content recommendation feature attributed to 12% increase in premium conversion

Mobile Engineer — Venmo (2016–2018)
- Implemented biometric authentication for 22M users; reduced support tickets by 40%
- Migrated legacy Objective-C codebase to Swift, covering 70% of codebase in 18 months

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (2016)

SKILLS
Swift, Kotlin, React Native, Objective-C | XCTest, Espresso, Detox | CI/CD: Fastlane, Bitrise | Firebase, Amplitude, Datadog

CERTIFICATIONS
Apple Certified Developer | Google Associate Android Developer

David Okonkwo | Lead Product Manager | david.okonkwo@email.com | linkedin.com/in/davidokonkwo

SUMMARY
Lead Product Manager with 9 years of experience shipping B2B SaaS products from 0 to $50M ARR. Expert at translating customer insights into roadmaps that drive retention and revenue. MBA from Wharton.

EXPERIENCE
Lead Product Manager — Figma (2020–Present)
- Owned Developer Mode product line; grew enterprise adoption by 340% in 18 months, adding $22M ARR
- Partnered with engineering (12-person team) to ship 6 major releases on schedule with <3% post-launch defect rate
- Established quarterly OKR process adopted across 8 product teams; improved roadmap alignment scores by 47%
- Conducted 200+ customer interviews, synthesizing insights into 3 breakthrough feature bets

Senior Product Manager — HubSpot (2017–2020)
- Launched CRM automation suite; drove 28% improvement in user activation within 60 days
- Reduced churn by 15% through proactive health score feature built with data science team

Product Manager — Zendesk (2015–2017)
- Shipped 4 integrations (Slack, Jira, Salesforce, GitHub) used by 8,000+ enterprise customers

EDUCATION
MBA — The Wharton School, University of Pennsylvania (2015)
B.S. Industrial Engineering — Purdue University (2012)

SKILLS
Product Strategy, Roadmapping, OKRs | SQL, Amplitude, Mixpanel | User Research, A/B Testing | Agile, Scrum, Shape Up

CERTIFICATIONS
PMI-ACP (Agile Certified Practitioner) | Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO)

Elena Volkov | Principal Software Architect | elena.volkov@email.com | linkedin.com/in/elenavolkov

SUMMARY
Principal Architect with 15 years designing enterprise-scale platforms across fintech, healthtech, and e-commerce. Author of 2 O'Reilly books on microservices. Speaker at QCon, Strange Loop, and AWS re:Invent.

EXPERIENCE
Principal Architect — JPMorgan Chase (2018–Present)
- Designed event-driven architecture for real-time payments platform processing $2.4T annually
- Led modernization of 300+ legacy SOAP services to REST/gRPC, reducing latency by 55%
- Established architecture review board; evaluated 150+ proposals, improving system reliability from 99.5% to 99.97%
- Mentored 20 senior engineers across 6 teams on DDD, CQRS, and event sourcing patterns

Senior Architect — Amazon (2013–2018)
- Co-designed fulfillment center orchestration system handling Black Friday peak of 12K orders/sec
- Drove adoption of service mesh (Envoy) across 40 teams, eliminating 85% of cross-service networking incidents

Software Engineer — Microsoft (2009–2013)
- Contributed to Azure Service Bus initial release; handled 500M messages/day at GA

EDUCATION
M.S. Computer Science — MIT (2009)
B.S. Computer Science — Moscow State University (2007)

SKILLS
Microservices, DDD, CQRS, Event Sourcing | Java, Go, Rust | Kafka, RabbitMQ, gRPC | AWS, Azure, Kubernetes

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Solutions Architect – Professional | TOGAF 9 Certified | Azure Solutions Architect Expert

Raj Patel | Senior Machine Learning Engineer | raj.patel@email.com | github.com/rajpatel-ml | linkedin.com/in/rajpatel-mle

SUMMARY
Senior ML Engineer with 6 years building production ML systems at internet scale. Specializes in LLM fine-tuning, recommendation systems, and real-time inference optimization. Published 2 NeurIPS workshop papers.

EXPERIENCE
Senior ML Engineer — Pinterest (2021–Present)
- Built visual search model serving 2B daily queries with 99.9% uptime; improved precision@10 by 23%
- Fine-tuned LLaMA 2 for content moderation, reducing manual review queue by 67% (saving $3.2M/yr)
- Optimized inference stack using TensorRT + triton, cutting serving cost by 41%
- Led GPU cluster migration to A100s, improving training throughput by 3.8x

ML Engineer — Lyft (2019–2021)
- Developed ETA prediction model reducing trip estimate error by 31% for 1.4M daily rides
- Built real-time feature store (Redis + Kafka) enabling sub-50ms feature retrieval for 15 live models

Data Scientist — IBM Watson (2018–2019)
- Trained NER models for enterprise document processing with 88% F1 on proprietary datasets

EDUCATION
M.S. Machine Learning — Georgia Tech (2018)
B.Tech Computer Science — IIT Bombay (2016)

SKILLS
Python, CUDA, C++ | PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX | TensorRT, Triton, ONNX | Kubeflow, MLflow, Ray | LLM fine-tuning, RLHF, RAG

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty | NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute Certificate

Jordan Torres | Senior Security Engineer | jordan.torres@email.com | linkedin.com/in/jordantorres-sec

SUMMARY
Senior Security Engineer with 8 years in application security, cloud security, and incident response. Reduced critical vulnerability exposure by 90% at two organizations. CISSP, OSCP, and AWS Security Specialty certified.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Security Engineer — Cloudflare (2020–Present)
- Built automated SAST/DAST pipeline integrated into CI/CD, scanning 450+ repos with <2min feedback loop
- Discovered and remediated 3 critical supply chain vulnerabilities before exploitation; prevented estimated $8M exposure
- Designed zero-trust network architecture for internal tools serving 4,000 employees
- Led SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certification efforts across 3 product lines

Security Engineer — Palantir (2018–2020)
- Developed threat detection rules for SIEM platform, improving true-positive rate from 34% to 71%
- Conducted 50+ penetration tests across internal and customer-facing systems; all critical findings remediated

Junior Security Engineer — Booz Allen Hamilton (2016–2018)
- Supported red team engagements for US federal clients; documented 120+ actionable findings

EDUCATION
B.S. Cybersecurity — University of Maryland (2016)

SKILLS
Penetration Testing, Threat Modeling, SIEM | AWS Security, GCP Security | Python, Go, Bash | OWASP, MITRE ATT&CK | Burp Suite, Metasploit, Semgrep

CERTIFICATIONS
CISSP | OSCP (Offensive Security Certified Professional) | AWS Security Specialty
